item.name: Retrieve Product Names and Customer Last Name

Retrieve a Single Product by SKU
Retrieve Multiple Product IDs by SKU

Aliases and Fragments to get Product/Variant data

graphql.query:
query customer {
    customer {
        entityId
        company
        customerGroupId
        email
        firstName
        lastName
        notes
        phone
        taxExemptCategory
        addressCount
        attributeCount
    }
}

item.name: Cart

request.description: You may or may not choose to add all the available fields and fragments to get an updated cart response

item.description:
Cart and Checkout API requires can use regular storefront token for most operations. But for headless Customer Impersonation tokens is adviced in any case.

The API is subject to change so keep an eye on discrepancies and update accordingly.
